name: Love's Travel Stop #412
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-95 Exit 77 with roughly 55-75 truck parking spaces, multiple diesel/DEF lanes, 8 showers, a CAT Scale, restaurant and convenience store.

name: Pilot Travel Center (Sadler Travel Plaza)
description: Large Pilot-branded travel plaza at I-95 Exit 75 with about 150 truck parking spaces, 12 diesel lanes, 9 showers, a CAT Scale, tire repair/towing, plus Dairy Queen and Quiznos.

name: Sheetz #804
description: 24-hour Sheetz travel center at I-95 Exit 41 with 7 high-flow diesel lanes, DEF, made-to-order food, and 41 free overnight truck parking spaces.

name: Sun Do Truck Stop
description: Independent truck stop near I-95 Exit 22 north of Lumberton offering diesel, a convenience store, and truck parking.

name: Sunoco Travel Plaza (Cedar Creek Rd)
description: Sunoco-branded fuel and convenience stop at I-95 Exit 49 with diesel, convenience store, and truck parking listed among Fayetteville truck stops.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Dunn
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Love's Travel Stop #412 at I-95 Exit 77 in Dunn.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Dunn (Sadler Travel Plaza)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot/Sadler Travel Plaza at I-95 Exit 75 in Dunn.

name: I-95 Robeson County Weigh Station (Northbound)
description: Fixed NCSHP weigh/inspection station on northbound I-95 at mile marker 24 north of Lumberton; one fixed scale, PrePass-equipped, also a vehicle inspection site.

name: I-95 Robeson County Weigh Station (Southbound)
description: Fixed NCSHP weigh/inspection station on southbound I-95 at mile marker 24 north of Lumberton; one fixed scale, PrePass-equipped.

name: I-95 South N.C. Welcome Center
address: I-95 near the South Carolina state line
description: NCDOT welcome center/rest area near the SC line in southern Robeson County, rebuilt in 2024, with family restrooms, Wi-Fi, vending (restrooms/vending 24/7), and RV/truck parking.

name: I-95 Cumberland County Rest Area (Northbound)
description: 24-hour NCDOT rest area on northbound I-95 at mile marker 47, about a mile south of Fayetteville, with restrooms, vending, dog-walk area, and picnic tables.

name: I-95 Cumberland County Rest Area (Southbound)
description: 24-hour NCDOT rest area on southbound I-95 at mile marker 47 near Fayetteville (last NC rest area heading south), with restrooms, vending, dog-walk area, and picnic tables.

name: Royal Inn Lumberton
description: Budget motel just off I-95 Exit 20 that explicitly offers free large truck/trailer parking, 24/7 desk, and complimentary continental breakfast.

name: Mangum's Towing & Road Service (Fayetteville)
description: Heavy-duty towing, recovery, mobile road service and tire service covering the I-95 corridor across eastern NC and upper SC, with a semi-truck repair shop serving the Fayetteville/Dunn stretch.

name: C-R Road Service
description: 24-hour roadside and on-site repair for truck, trailer, reefer, RV and bus near I-95 in Lumberton, including tire service, DOT inspections, electrical repair and heavy-duty towing.

name: C-R Road Service Truck & Trailer Wash
description: Truck wash and trailer washout service offered at C-R Road Service near I-95 in Lumberton.

name: Discount Tire Sales & Service (Lumberton)
description: Tire and auto-repair shop serving Lumberton, Fayetteville and Laurinburg, offering commercial and truck tires near the I-95 corridor.

name: Tire Sales & Service, Inc. (Commercial Tires)
description: Fayetteville tire dealer offering commercial/semi-truck tire sales and service, positioned as a one-stop commercial tire shop near the I-95 corridor.

name: Robeson Community College CDL Truck Driving Academy
description: Community-college CDL Class A training academy just off I-95 north of Lumberton preparing students for entry-level tractor-trailer driving.

name: Fayetteville Technical Community College CDL Program
description: FTCC's Commercial Driver's License training program in Fayetteville near the I-95 corridor, offering Class A CDL preparation.

name: Miller-Motte CDL Training (Fayetteville)
description: Miller-Motte CDL/commercial driver training campus in Fayetteville serving the I-95 region.

name: TransTech CDL Training (Fayetteville)
description: TransTech commercial truck driver training location in Fayetteville, leveraging the city's position on I-95 for local, regional and OTR placement.
